recommendations.title: Spring
recommendations.overview: A young man in a personal tailspin flees the US to Italy, where he sparks up a romance with a woman harboring a dark, primordial secret.

recommendations.title: The Endless
recommendations.overview: Two brothers return to the cult they fled from years ago to discover that the group's beliefs may be more sane than they once thought.

recommendations.title: Resolution
recommendations.overview: A man imprisons his estranged junkie friend in an isolated cabin in the boonies of San Diego to force him through a week of sobriety, but the events of that week are being mysteriously manipulated.

recommendations.title: Synchronic
recommendations.overview: Two New Orleans paramedics' lives are ripped apart after encountering a series of horrific deaths linked to a designer drug with bizarre, otherworldly effects.

recommendations.title: Something in the Dirt
recommendations.overview: When neighbors John and Levi witness supernatural events in their LA apartment building, they realize documenting the paranormal could inject some fame and fortune into their wasted lives.

recommendations.title: Timecrimes
recommendations.overview: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

recommendations.title: Colossal
recommendations.overview: A woman discovers that severe catastrophic events are somehow connected to the mental breakdown from which she's suffering.

recommendations.title: Totem
recommendations.overview: A teen must resort to extreme measures to protect her family from a supernatural entity.

recommendations.title: Pooka!
recommendations.overview: A struggling actor gets a holiday season job as a Christmas character in a plush suit to promote the hottest toy of the year, Pooka; he slowly develops two personalities—one when he's in the suit and one that's outside it.

recommendations.title: Deadgirl
